name: L.S. Wolfenrirr
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving it is halved. If it battles, your opponent cannot activate monster effects until the end of the damage step. If it attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict double piercing battle damage. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Feidren
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Monsters cannot activate their effects, except "L.S." monsters. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving it is halved. This effect cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Jogzhen
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving it is halved. Once per turn: You can banish 1 card on the field.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Exmond Veller
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation and effect of its effects cannot be negated. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving it is halved. If it battles a monster, it gains 1000 ATK during damage calculation only. You can halve its original ATK until the End Phase; it can attack all monsters your opponent controls once each during this turn.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Death
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. After it is Special Summoned, your opponent skips their next Draw Phase. Your opponent cannot draw cards except during the Draw Phase, nor add cards from the Deck to their hand. You can return it to the top of the Deck; return 1 random card from your opponent’s hand to the bottom of the Deck, also during your next Draw Phase, draw 3 cards instead of 1 for your normal draw. You can only use this effect of “L.S. Death” once per Duel. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Irazdiel
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving it is halved. While it is in your hand/field, you take no effect damage, also your opponent cannot banish cards. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Zyphiron Omega
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving it is halved. You can pay 2000 LP and banish this card you control along with 2 non-Tuner "L.S." monsters from your hand/field/GY; Special Summon 1 "L.S." Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck. (This is treated as a Synchro Summon.)
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Quorzan
lore: 3 Level 9 "L.S." monsters Cannot be destroyed by battle. Your opponent takes any battle damage you would have taken from battles involving this card. If this card you control would be destroyed by a card effect, you can detach 1 material from it instead. Neither player can Tribute cards. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Grivrias
lore: 1 "L.S." Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner "L.S." monsters Any effect that would make your opponent gain LP inflicts the same amount of damage to them, instead. Your opponent cannot conduct their Battle Phase. Monsters cannot be Set or flipped face-down  (but can be Normal and Special Summoned in face-up Defense Position instead). These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Demiuros
lore: 2 "L.S." monsters Must be either Fusion Summoned with the above Fusion Materials, or Special Summoned by sending the above cards you control to the GY. Control of all face-up monsters on the field returns to the owners. Negate all card effects that activate in the GY. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Hydrax
lore: You can Ritual Summon it with "L.S. Howl". Must be Ritual Summoned. Unaffected by other cards' effects. You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; Special Summon 1 "L.S." monster from your Deck/Extra Deck with ATK less or equal to that target. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Hydrax" once per turn.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Shifting Seal
lore: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "L.S." Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. Unaffected by other cards' effects. You cannot Special Summon non-"L.S." monsters. This effect cannot be negated. You can Normal Summon "L.S." monsters without Tributing. If all monsters you control are "L.S." monsters (min. 1), the effects of  non- "L.S." monsters in the hand cannot be activated. Each time that a "L.S." monster(s) is Summoned: You can gain 300 LP. You can only activate 1 "L.S. Shifting Seal" per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Howl
lore: Its activation/effect cannot be negated. Cards/effects cannot be activated in response to its activation. Ritual Summon 1 "L.S. Hydrax" from your hand/Deck/GY/banishment, by Tributing "L.S." monsters from your hand/field, whose total Levels equal exactly 9.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Interdimensional Warp
lore: Its activation/effect cannot be negated. Discard 1 card; Special Summon as many "L.S." monsters as possible from your Deck (they cannot attack and their effects are negated), then lose 500 LP for each one Summoned, also banish each one separately during the End Phase in the same order they were Summoned. (These monsters are are not banished by this effect if "L.S. Shifting Seal" is on the field.) You can only activate 1 "L.S. Interdimensional Warp" per Duel, also you cannot Summon the turn you activate it, except "L.S." monsters.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Retribution
lore: Its activation/effect cannot be negated. Cards/effects cannot be activated in response to its activation. Pay 950 LP, then target 1 face-up "L.S." monster you control; banish it face-down, and if you do, for the rest of this turn, the activation/effects of all other face-up cards on the field are negated, also any damage your opponent takes is halved. You can only activate 1 "L.S. Retribution" per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Gravorzer
lore: 4 Level 11 monsters You can also Xyz Summon it by discarding 1 "L.S." card and using "L.S. Quorzan" you control. The activation and effect of its effects cannot be negated. "L.S." monsters you control cannot be targeted or destroyed by your opponent's card effects. Neither player can Tribute cards. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 2 materials from it; look at your opponent's Deck and banish up to 4 cards from it, face-down, then inflict 200 damage to your opponent for each card banished this way. During your opponent's turn, if this Xyz Summoned card you control leaves the field or is returned to the Extra Deck: It becomes the End Phase of this turn.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Tempestrax
lore: 2+ "L.S." monsters Its Link Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. If it is Link Summoned: You can add from your Deck to your hand, 2 "L.S." monsters, or 1 "L.S." Spell/Trap. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Tempestrax" once per Duel. Cannot be Tributed, nor used as material for a Fusion/Synchro/Xyz/Link Summon. You can send it to the GY; this turn, each time you gain LP while your opponent's LP are 4500 or more, they gain 300 LP. When Link Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects, nor in response to its effect activations.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Kodrelor
lore: "L.S. Demiuros" + 1 "L.S." monster Must be either Fusion Summoned with the above Fusion Materials, or Special Summoned by sending the above cards you control to the GY. Gains the original effects of "L.S. Demiuros" while on the field. "L.S." monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Afterlife Return
lore: If your LP are 4000 or less: Banish any number of "L.S." cards from your GY; gain 600 LP for each "L.S." card banished by this effect. Cards/effects cannot be activated in response to this card's activation. (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY; Target 7 of your other "L.S." banished cards with different names; Shuffle them into the Deck, then draw 2 cards. This last effect cannot be negated. You can only activate each effect of "L.S. Afterlife Return" once per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Monumental Peak
lore: Send this card to the GY during your 2nd End Phase after activation. This card cannot be targeted by card effects. Once per turn: You can banish 1 "L.S." card from your GY; draw 1 card. If you have an "L.S." monster in your GY: You can banish this card from your GY; you take no damage this turn. If this card is banished; you can target 1 of your banished "L.S." monsters; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Monumental Peak" once per Duel. You can only control 1 "L.S. Monumental Peak". These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Hexdelon
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Cannot be used as material for a Summon/Tributed, except for the Summon of a "L.S." monster. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving it is halved. If it leaves the field: Pay 500 LP; Special Summon it. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Maelus Titanis
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. You take no battle damage from battles involving "L.S." monsters you control. If it would be destroyed by battle, you can discard 1 card instead. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Kaliteus Derias
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Neither player can Special Summon Level/Rank 3 or lower monsters, nor Link-2 or lower monsters. Cannot be destroyed by an effect that does not target it. Once per opponent's Standby Phase: double its ATK until the end of this turn.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Rexiom
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. You can Tribute it from your hand/field; add 1 other "L.S." monster from your Deck/GY/banishment to your hand. You can equip 1 monster your opponent controls to it as an Equip Spell. Gains ATK equal to the equipped monster's. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects, nor in response to its effect activations. You can only use each effect of "L.S. Rexiom" once per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Shadow Bloodblade
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effect. During damage calculation, if it battles a monster: You can banish this card until the End Phase; banish 1 monster your opponent controls. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Aldionus
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effect. If it is Summoned: You can look at your opponent's hand, then choose 1 card in it and add it to your hand. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Aldionus" twice per turn. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Kelarios
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor its effect. Effect damage your opponent takes is doubled. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Yrionir
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. You can inflict 1300 damage to your opponent. If it leaves the field: You can inflict 1300 damage to your opponent, then you can destroy 1 card on the field. You can only use each effect of "L.S. Yrionir" once per turn. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects, nor in response to its effect activations.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Shadow Emperor Dragon Bekrelon
lore: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand/GY) by having 2+ other "L.S." monsters in your GY and 2+ "L.S." monsters banished. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation and effect of its effects. Gains the effects of all "L.S." monsters in your GY/banishment. If it is banished: You can return it to the GY. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Shadow Emperor Dragon Bekrelon" once per Duel and you can only Special Summon it once per turn.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Showdown
lore: Neither player can activate cards/Effects in response to this card's activation. If you control "L.S. Shifting Seal": Send 3 "L.S." monsters from your Deck to the GY and pay 2000 LP; banish 2 "L.S." monsters from your Deck. Its activation/effect cannot be negated. You can only activate "L.S. Showdown" once per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Shadow Emperor Azdren
lore: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand/GY) by having 2+ other "L.S." monsters in your GY and 2+ "L.S." monsters banished. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor its effects. Gains the effects of all "L.S." monsters in your Extra Deck. You can only Special Summon "L.S. Shadow Emperor Azdren" once per turn.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Phantom Sentinel
lore: Target 1 "L.S." monster in your GY, except an Xyz or Link Monster: Banish it and pay 950 LP; Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster, with the (Type/Attribute/Level/ATK/DEF) and effects of the banished target. (This card is NOT treated as a Trap). Cards/effects cannot be activated in response to this card's activation. If a monster is Special Summoned from your opponent's Extra Deck, while this card is in the GY: You can Set this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Soul Transfer
lore: Neither player can activate cards/Effects in response to this card's activation. Pay 4000 LP and banish 6 monsters with different Attributes from your Extra Deck, face-down; Special Summon 1 "L.S. Shadow Emperor Azdelon" from your hand/Deck/GY, ignoring its Summoning conditions. It is unaffected by the effects of your cards, except for its own effects and this card's, but shuffle it into the Deck during your opponent's next End Phase, also for the rest of this turn you cannot Summon/Set other monsters. Its activation/effect cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Ultimate Wrath
lore: If you have no cards in your GY; You can halve your LP to Special Summon 1 "L.S. Shadow Emperor Dragon Bekrelon" from your hand, or Deck, (ignoring its Summoning conditions), then it becomes the End Phase of this turn. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Ultimate Wrath" once per Duel. Equip only to a "L.S. Shadow Emperor Dragon Bekrelon" you control. While face-up on the field this card is unaffected by other cards' effects, also you cannot lose the Duel. You must have 1000 or less LP to equip this card to it. Once during your Standby Phase: You can add this card from your GY to your hand. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Nifr'Hilm
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. Once while face-up on the field (Quick Effect): You can give control of it to your opponent until the end of this turn, also during the End Phase of this turn, all other monsters on the field are banished, then it gains 1000 ATK/DEF for each card banished this way. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Nifr'Hilm" once per turn. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Agerzhaider
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. Its original DEF become the number of "L.S." monsters in your GY x 1000. If it is attacked: You can change it to Defense Position, and proceed to damage calculation. Once per turn: You can inflict damage to your opponent equal to half its DEF. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to its effect activations.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Split Reincarnation
lore: Once per Duel, you can send 1 "L.S" monster you control to the GY and pay half your LP: Choose 1 of the following effects to activate; ● Special Summon 1 "L.S." Xyz monster from your Extra Deck or GY, by banishing 4 "L.S" monsters with different names from your Deck, face-down, and attach it this card as material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon.) ● Special Summon 1 "L.S." Link monster from your Extra Deck or GY, by banishing 3 "L.S." monsters from your Deck, face-down. (This is treated as a Link Summon.) If a monster Summoned with this card leaves the field, and all monsters that where used to Summon it are currently banished face-down: You can Special Summon all of them, but their effects are negated, and their ATK/DEF are halved. This card's activation and effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Galmuran
lore: 1 "L.S." Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner "L.S." monsters The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Your opponent must play with their hand revealed. The effects of face-up Flip/Spirit/Toon monsters on the field are negated. If it was destroyed/banished this turn and it is still your GY/banishment (Quick Effect): You can discard 1 "L.S." monster; Special Summon it, then it gains ATK equal to that monster's (this is treated as a Synchro Summon). Your opponent cannot activate cards/effects in response to this effect's activation. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Galmuran" once per turn.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Thundraxas
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. Gains 300 ATK/DEF for each banished Normal Monster. (Quick Effect): You can send it to the GY until the End Phase; banish all Normal Monsters from the Decks, then inflict 400 damage to your opponent for each card banished this way. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Equirhas
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. (Quick Effect): You can reduce its Level by 1; Special Summon 1 "L.S." monster from your GY/banishment as a Level 1 Tuner monster, then immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 "L.S." monster from your Extra Deck/GY/banishment using only this card and that monster. During the End Phase, if it is in your GY: You can pay 500 LP; return it to the hand. You can only use each effect of "L.S. Equirhas" once per turn. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to its effect activations.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Xiang Lung
lore: 2 "L.S." monsters Cannot be used as a material/Tributed for a Summon, except for the Summon of a "L.S." monster. Gains 500 ATK for each "L.S." monster in your GY. You can only use each of the following effects of "L.S. Xiang Lung" once per Duel. (Quick Effect): You can banish 2 WATER "L.S." monsters from your Deck, face-down; Special Summon this card from your Extra Deck. (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 non-Extra Deck "L.S." monster with 0 ATK from your hand, Deck, or GY. Your opponent cannot activate cards/effects in response to this card's effects' activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Foldem
lore: 2 "L.S." monsters Cannot be used as a material/Tributed for a Summon, except for the Summon of a "L.S." monster. Its original ATK is the number of "L.S." monsters in your banishment x 1000. You can only use each of the following effects of "L.S. Foldem" once per Duel. (Quick Effect): You can banish 2 FIRE "L.S." monsters from your Deck, face-down; Special Summon this card from your Extra Deck. (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 non-Extra Deck "L.S." monster with 0 DEF from your hand, Deck, or GY. Your opponent cannot activate cards/effects in response to this card's effects' activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Ahmol Noth
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effect. (Quick Effect): You can send it to the GY until the End Phase, then declare 1 card type (Monster, Spell, or Trap); that type of card (if Spell/Trap) cannot be activated, or (if Monster) cannot activate its effects, until the end of your opponent's next turn. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Ahmol Noth" once per turn. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Udrel Gigas
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. (Quick Effect): You can shuffle it into the Deck; banish all Gemini monsters from the Decks. If there are 10 or more Gemini monsters banished, you can Special Summon it (from your Deck), and its original ATK becomes 4000. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to its effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Oveldain
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. If it is Summoned: You can add 1 "Perfect Timing" from your Deck to your hand. You can send it to the GY: Activate this effect; any time you Fusion Summon a "L.S." monster this turn, you can banish its materials from your hand/field/Deck/GY, if you do so using this effect, you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except "L.S." monsters. You can only use each effect of "L.S. Oveldain" once per turn. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects, nor in response to its effect activations.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Leonian Goxis
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. Gains ATK/DEF equal to half your LP. (Quick Effect): You can return it to the hand; banish all Union monsters from the Decks, then gain 500 LP for each card banished this way. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Balmoor
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Monsters your opponent controls with 2000 or more ATK/DEF are destroyed (even if face-down). This effect cannot be negated. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Hyperus Bjorlnnir
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effect. During your opponent's Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can banish it from your hand/GY; banish all Spells/Traps from your opponent's field/GY, face-down, then it becomes the End Phase. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Hyperus Bjorlnnir" once per Duel. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Ravrax
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Can be treated as 2 materials for the Xyz Summon of a "L.S." Xyz Monster that requires 3+ materials. Your opponent cannot send cards from the Deck to the GY, nor Special Summon monsters from their Deck. These effects cannot be negated. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Qervras
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) in face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated. If it declares an attack on a face-up monster, or is targeted for an attack (even if face-down), that monster is destroyed immediately, also flip this card face-up if it was face-down. Your opponent cannot attack "L.S." monsters you control, except this one. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Xiaopteryx Khaan
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Can attack directly. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can pay 2000 LP; Set all face-up Spells/Traps on the field, and change all other face-up monsters on the field to face-down Defense Position, then it gains 1000 ATK for each card changed face-down and Set this way until the end of this turn.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Terval
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 100 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Can attack twice during each Battle Phase. Your opponent cannot activate Spells/Traps during the Battle Phase. When you take 2000+ damage, while it is in your hand/GY/banishment: You can Special Summon it. Once per turn, if it battles a monster, during damage calculation (Quick Effect): You can target that monster; (until the end of this turn) change its ATK to 0, and if you do, this card gains that lost ATK.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Xhin Yeong Zhun
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Neither player can activate effects or cards that involve coin tossing effects and/or roll a six-sided die, also the effects of those cards are negated. The ATK/DEF of all other monsters on the field becomes 2000. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can place 1 card from either Extra Deck, underneath it. During the End Phase of the turn it leaves the field, return all cards that where underneath it to the Extra Decks.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Ragnadragnum
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. If it battles a monster, you can make its ATK become the same as that monster's +1000 during damage calculation only. When a monster effect is activated on the field or when a Spell/Trap is activated (Quick Effect): You can reduce its ATK/DEF by exactly 500 (permanently) and pay 500 LP; the activated effect becomes "both players draw 1 card". You can only use this effect of "L.S. Ragnadragnum" once per turn. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Yothzel
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand/GY) by paying 500 LP. You can only Special Summon "L.S. Yothzel" once per turn this way. Its Special Summon cannot be negated. Gains 350 ATK/DEF for each "L.S." monster in your banishment. Your opponent must pay 500 LP to Normal Summon, Special Summon, or Set cards. These effects cannot be negated. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated..
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Poknaerhas
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Gains 700 ATK/DEF for each "L.S." Spell/Trap in your GY/banishment. Your opponent must pay 500 LP to activate card effects, or to declare an attack. If it is banished: You can banish 2 "L.S." monsters from your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Poknaerhas" once per turn. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Zelgion
lore: The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Reveal it in your hand; roll a six-sided die thrice and apply these effects based on the result, then Special Summon it, also you cannot Summon monsters until the end of the next turn. (If you controlled no monsters you can treat 1 of the results as 6 by paying half your LP). ●3+: Cannot be banished, also you take no effect damage. ●4+: Cannot be destroyed by battle, also you take no battle damage from battles involving it. ●5+: Can attack directly. ●6+: Its original ATK/DEF become 5000.  ●7+: Unaffected by the effects of other LIGHT/DARK/WIND monsters. ●8+: Unaffected by the effects of other FIRE/EARTH/WATER monsters. ●9+: Unaffected by the effects of other DIVINE monsters. ●10+: Unaffected by Spell effects. ●11+: Unaffected by Trap effects. ●12+: Cannot be used as material for a Fusion/Synchro/Xyz/Link Summon. ●13+: Cannot be Tributed. ●14+: Cannot be send to the GY, nor returned to the hand or Deck. ●15+: Once per turn: You can make your opponent's LP become 5100. ●16+: Once per turn: You can send all Spells/Traps on the field/Decks to the GY, except Field Spells; for the rest of this turn the effects of cards in the hands/GYs/banishment are negated and cannot be activated. ●17+: Once per turn: You can banish any number of cards from the Extra Decks, face-down; banish an equal number of cards from their Deck, face-down. ●18: You win the Duel. You opponent cannot activate cards/effects in response to its effect activations.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Udron Magnas
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving it is halved. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can toss a coin thrice; apply these effects in sequence (skip over any that do not apply), also cards/effects cannot be activated in response to this effect's activation. If Heads, your opponent performs it. If Tails, you perform it. ● Return 1 card from your hand to the Deck; lose 500 LP. ● Return 1 Spell/Trap you control to the Deck; lose 500 LP. ● Return 1 monster you control to the Deck; lose 500 LP.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Worian
lore: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Any battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving this card is halved. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Ehris
lore: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. During the End Phase, exchange your LP, with your opponent's current ones. This effect of "L.S. Ehris" is only applied once per Duel (per different player/controller). Any battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving this card is halved. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Bormain
lore: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Any battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving this card is halved. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Primus Conquestio
lore: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned while your LP are 999 or less from your (hand/Deck/GY/banishment) by paying all your LP except 1 and banishing all other cards in your hand/GY. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor its effects. Cannot be Tributed and is unaffected by your opponent's card effects while you control no other monsters. Neither player takes damage. The first time it would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. After damage calculation, if it battled, place 1 Destiny Slash Counter on it. If it has 2 Destiny Slash Counters, you win the Duel. During the 3rd End Phase after you Summon it, you lose the Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Lightning-Lancer Black Cavalier
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. Unaffected by your opponent's card effects while you control no other monsters. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can change the ATK of all other face-up monsters on the field to 0, then it gains 1000 ATK for each monster whose ATK was changed to 0 by this effect, also during the End Phase of this turn, if this card did not battled and is still on the field, while your opponent controls a card, they must send 1 card they control to the GY, then they lose 1000 LP.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Jiauer
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. (Quick Effect): You can discard 1 card and send it to the GY; add to your hand, or activate, 1 "L.S." Continuous Trap from your Deck/GY. During the End Phase, if it is in your GY/banishment: You can pay 500 LP; Special Summon it as a Level 2 monster, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Synchro Summon 1 "L.S." monster. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Jiauer" twice per Duel. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to its effect activations.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Loonvraen
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. Can attack while in face-up Defense Position. If it does, apply its DEF for damage calculation. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can switch the ATK/DEF of all monsters currently on the field until the end of this turn. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can change the battle position of 1 face-up monster on the field. Once per turn, if its battle position changes: You can switch its ATK/DEF.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Ierua
lore: [ Pendulum Effect ] You cannot Special Summon monsters, except "L.S." monsters. This effect cannot be negated. (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your Pendulum Zone (ignoring its Summoning conditions), but for the rest of this turn you cannot Special Summon monsters, except "L.S." monsters. You can only use this effect of L.S. Ierua" once per turn. ------------------------------------------ [ Monster Effect ] 1 "L.S." Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner "L.S." monsters Must first be Synchro Summoned. If this card is Special Summoned: You can look at your opponent's Deck, and Set 1 Spell directly from either Deck to your Spell & Trap Zone, and if it is a Quick-Play Spell, it can be activated this turn, also banish it when it leaves the field, then you can draw 1 card. When this card is destroyed: You can place it in your Pendulum Zone. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Ceivir
lore: [ Pendulum Effect ] You cannot Special Summon, except "L.S." monsters. This effect cannot be negated. (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon it from your Pendulum Zone, ignoring its Summoning conditions, but for the rest of this turn you cannot Special Summon, except "L.S." monsters. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Ceivir" once per turn. ------------------------------------------ [ Monster Effect ] 2 Level 11 "L.S." monsters You can also Xyz Summon it by discarding 1 "L.S." monster, then using 1 "L.S." monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck you control as material. (Transfer its materials). The activation and effect of its effects cannot be negated. Gains 1000 ATK for each "L.S." monster you control. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from it; Special Summon up to 2 "L.S." monsters from your hand/Deck, but they cannot declare an attack. If it is destroyed: You can place it in your Pendulum Zone.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Vragnir
lore: [ Pendulum Effect ] You cannot Special Summon, except "L.S." monsters. This effect cannot be negated. (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon it from your Pendulum Zone, ignoring its Summoning conditions, but for the rest of this turn you cannot Special Summon, except "L.S." monsters. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Vragnir" once per turn. ---------------------------------------- [ Monster Effect ] 3 "L.S." monsters (1 WATER, 1 WIND,  and 1 LIGHT) Must be Fusion Summoned. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. If it is Special Summoned: You can make your LP become 4000, also it gains 4000 ATK, then you can draw 1 card. If you would take effect damage, while it is in your Extra Deck, you can destroy it instead. If it is destroyed: You can place it in your Pendulum Zone.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Zeraiel
lore: [ Pendulum Effect ] You cannot Special Summon, except "L.S." monsters. This effect cannot be negated. (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon it from your Pendulum Zone, ignoring its Summoning conditions, but for the rest of this turn you cannot Special Summon, except "L.S." monsters. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Zeraiel" once per turn. ---------------------------------- [ Monster Effect ] 3 Level 9 "L.S." monsters The activation and effect of its effects cannot be negated. If it is Xyz Summoned: You can attach 1 "L.S. Quorzan" from your Extra Deck/GY to it as material. Gains 500 ATK for each material attached to it. (Quick Effect): You can detach 2 materials from it; attach up to 4 cards in either GY to it as material. Your opponent cannot activate cards/effects in response to this effect's activation. You can use this effect of "L.S. Zeraiel" up to twice per Duel. If it is destroyed: You can place it in your Pendulum Zone. The name of an Xyz Monster that has it as material becomes "L.S." Quorzan".
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Morthreval
lore: [ Pendulum Effect ] You cannot Special Summon non-"L.S." monsters. This effect cannot be negated. (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your Pendulum Zone, ignoring its Summoning conditions, but for the rest of this turn you cannot Special Summon non-"L.S." monsters. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Morthreval" once per turn. ---------------------------------------- [ Monster Effect ] 3 "L.S." monsters (1 EARTH, 1 FIRE,  and 1 DARK) Must first be Fusion Summoned. If this card is Special Summoned: You can look at your opponent's Deck, and Set 1 Trap directly from either Deck to your Spell & Trap Zone, also banish it when it leaves the field, then you can draw 1 card. That Trap can be activated this turn. When this card is destroyed: You can place it in your Pendulum Zone. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Nom'zhen
lore: [ Pendulum Effect ] You cannot Special Summon, except "L.S." monsters. This effect cannot be negated. (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon it from your Pendulum Zone, ignoring its Summoning conditions, but for the rest of this turn you cannot Special Summon, except "L.S." monsters. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Nom'zhen" once per turn. ------------------------------------- [ Monster Effect ] 1 "L.S." Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner "L.S." monsters Must first be Synchro Summoned. If this card is Special Summoned: You can look at your opponent's Extra Deck, and banish 1 monster from it. Then this card gains ATK equal to the original ATK of that monster. Monsters (other than "L.S." monsters) banished by this effect cannot be played for the rest of this Duel. When this card is destroyed: You can place it in your Pendulum Zone. These effects cannot be negated.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Shadow Emperor Xeilon
lore: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned from your hand/GY by its own effect. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. If a "L.S." monster(s) you control is destroyed/banished, except "L.S. Shadow Emperor Xeilon": You can pay half your LP; Special Summon it. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can halve both players' LP; neither player takes damage until the end of your opponent's next turn. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Shadow Emperor Xeilon" thrice per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Dekhaelos
lore: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) during a Duel you Summoned "L.S." monsters of all 7 Attributes, while at least 9 turns have passed since the start of the Duel. Its Special Summon cannot be negated. After it is Special Summoned, your opponent has until the end of the next turn to win the Duel, otherwise, you win the Duel/Match, also if this Duel would end in a DRAW, only its owner wins the Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Zero Hour
lore: The activation/effect of its activation/effects cannot be negated. Your opponent cannot activate cards/effects in response to its activation. You can activate it from your hand during your opponent's turn. Fusion Summon 1 "L.S." Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck/GY, using monsters from your hand/field as material. If it is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can pay 500 LP; add it to your hand. (Quick Effect): You can banish it from your GY; add to your hand, or activate, 1 "L.S. Hexed Canon" from your Deck/GY. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Zero Hour" once per turn.
author: Mardras

name: Perpetual Freezing
lore: (This card is always treated as a "L.S." card.) Apply the following effect(s) depending on the conditions met below. ● While you control a "L.S." monster with 0 ATK, your opponent cannot Set cards on the field, also they cannot activate their Set Spells/Traps. ● While you control a "L.S." monster with 0 DEF, neither player can Special Summon Tokens, also cards on the field cannot be returned to the hand or Deck. If you control no monsters: You can send this face-up card you control to the GY and pay half your LP; Special Summon 1 "L.S." monsters from your hand or Deck, but banish it during the End Phase. This card's effects cannot be negated. Neither player can activate cards/effects in response to this card and its effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Hexed Canon
lore: The activation/effect of its activation/effects cannot be negated. Activate it by declaring 1 monster Type. Monsters in the hands, field, and Extra Decks become DIVINE and the declared Type. If you do not control "L.S. Shifting Seal", destroy it. Unaffected by other card's effects. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can shuffle 1 "L.S." monster from your banishment into the Main Deck and pay 1250 LP; place 1 "L.S." Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck in your Pendulum Zone. You can only activate 1 "L.S. Hexed Canon" per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Balmoor's Prophecy
lore: Activate only during the Main Phase or Battle Phase, if you have previously Summoned "L.S. Balmoor" during this Duel, by paying LP, until you have 100 left. Skip turns, except the Standby Phase, equal to the number of "L.S." monsters with different Attributes you have previously Summoned during this Duel, and resume the Duel at that player's Main Phase or Battle Phase. If 7 turns where skipped with this effect; You can Special Summon 1 "L.S. Dekhaelos", (ignoring its Summoning conditions) from your hand, Deck or GY. These effects cannot be negated. Cards/effects cannot be activated in response to this card's activation. You can only activate "L.S. Balmoor's Prophecy" once per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Olfkan
lore: The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. (Quick Effect): You can equip it from your hand/GY to a face-up monster your opponent controls as an Equip Spell. While equipped to it this way apply these effects. Your opponent cannot activate cards/effects in response to this effect's activation. ● This Equip Spell is unaffected by other cards' effects. ● Neither player can activate the effects of a monster that is equipped with this card. ● Neither player can declare attacks with a monster equipped with this card. ● Neither player can Tribute, nor use as material for a Fusion/Synchro/Xyz/Link Summon a monster that is equipped with this card. ● Once while on the field, during the End Phase, give control of the equipped monster to your opponent (ignoring card effects). You can only use this effect of "L.S. Olfkan" once per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Orchellieusaurus
lore: You can Ritual Summon it with "L.S. Howl". Must be Ritual Summoned. Its name becomes "L.S. Hydrax" while in the hand/GY. You can reveal it in your hand; add 1 "L.S. Howl" from your Deck/GY to your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; Special Summon 1 "L.S." monster from your Deck/Extra Deck with DEF less or equal to that target. You can only use each effect of "L.S. Orchellieusaurus" once per turn.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Qvelkaul
lore: If it battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "L.S. Qvelkaul" once per turn. If it is in your hand (Quick Effect): You can target 1 "L.S." monster you control; Special Summon it, then change its target's Level by 1, and this card's original ATK/DEF becomes half of that target's. (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 "L.S." Synchro Monster using this card. If it is banished: You can pay 500 LP; add it to your hand. Your opponent cannot activate cards/effects in response to its effect activations.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Valfragox
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving it is halved. This effect cannot be negated. (Quick Effect): You can halve its ATK until the End Phase and banish 1 "L.S." card from your hand/Deck/GY; negate the effects of 1 face-up card on the field, until the end of this turn. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Valfragox" once per turn. When Special Summoned, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Chaldervain
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand/GY) by paying 500 LP. You can only Special Summon "L.S. Chaldervain" once per location each turn this way. If it is Summoned: You can banish 2 "L.S." monsters (1 from your Deck and 1 from your Extra Deck); its original ATK/DEF become their combined Levels/Ranks x 250. If it battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can return 1 card from your banishment to the GY; it gains 1000 ATK/DEF. Your opponent cannot activate cards/effects in response to its effect activations.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Bosden
lore: At the start of your opponent's Battle Phase, if you control 2 or less cards, while your LP are 4000 or less and your opponent's LP are 5000 or more, you can send it from your hand/Deck/field to the GY, make your opponent lose LP equal the monster with the highest ATK they control, then end the Battle Phase. This effect cannot be negated. You can only use this effect of "L.S. Bosden" once per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Funmei
lore: The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving a "L.S." Xyz Monster that has it as material is doubled. If it is in your hand/field/GY (Quick Effect): You can return 1 card from your banishment to the Deck and pay 500 LP; immediately after this effect resolves, Xyz Summon 1 Rank 9 "L.S." Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck/GY/banishment using it and "L.S." monsters from your hand/field/GY, also you cannot activate this effect of "L.S. Funmei" until the end of the next turn. Cards/effects cannot be activated in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Navrashni
lore: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand), also choose 1 Main Monster Zone and 1 Spell & Trap Zone, these Zones become forbidden for the rest of this Duel. You can only Special Summon "L.S. Navrashni" once per turn. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. When a card/effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can return it to the hand; for the rest of this turn, you cannot activate Spells/Traps or effects, also your opponent takes no damage, and neither player can Special Summon monsters with 2200 or higher ATK. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Molvadov
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. Each time your opponent Summons a monster(s), they lose 100 LP for each, and this amount is doubled by the number of times they have performed a Summon. (Quick Effect): You can return it from your hand/field to the Deck; this turn, your opponent cannot declare attacks with monsters whose ATK is higher than their LP. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Yeol'xu
lore: You can Special Summon it (from your hand) by paying 500 LP. The activation/effect of its effects cannot be negated. Battle damage your opponent takes from battles involving it is halved. During your turn, if it is banished from your Deck; for the rest of this Duel, your opponent cannot activate the effects of banished cards during the Main Phase 1, and cannot activate cards/effects during your Battle Phase. If it is sent from the field to the GY; for the rest of the Duel, your opponent cannot activate cards/effects during the Draw and End Phase, also their Standby Phase, and Main Phase 2 are skipped. When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to its effect activations.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Cadner
lore: The activation/effect of its effect cannot be negated. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can reveal it in your hand/Deck; Special Summon it, and if you do,  add this effect to that activated effect. Neither player can activate cards/effects in response to this effect's activation. ● Until the end of the next turn your opponent cannot Special Summon, except "L.S." monsters, also "L.S. Cadner" on the field is unaffected by card effects, except for its own and this card's, it cannot be Tributed, nor used as material for a Fusion/Synchro/Xyz/Link Summon, can attack all monsters your opponent controls once each, and when it does the ATK of those monsters becomes 0 (ignoring card effects), but your opponent takes no battle damage from battles involving it." You can only use this effect of "L.S. Cadner" once per Duel.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Isaneblax
lore: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand/GY/banishment) by returning 4 other "L.S." monsters to the Deck/Extra Deck (2 from each your GY/banishment). You can only Special Summon "L.S. Isaneblax" once per turn. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can declare 1 Spell/Trap Card name; for the rest of this Duel the activated effect of cards with that name becomes "your opponent Special Summons 1 "L.S." monster from their Deck/Extra Deck, if they do not, then you do, but if none did, for the rest of this turn, neither player takes damage". (This effect is not applied to "L.S." Spells/Traps.) Neither player can activate cards/effects in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras

name: L.S. Jalbaelom
lore: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand/GY/banishment) by returning 4 other "L.S." monsters to the Deck/Extra Deck (2 from each your GY/banishment). You can only Special Summon "L.S. Jalbaelom" once per turn. Its Special Summon cannot be negated, nor the activation/effect of its effects. If it battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. Once per turn (Quick Effect): Its owner can declare 1 Monster Card name; all copies of that card are erased and cannot be used for the rest of this Duel. (this effect is not applied to monsters whose original Type is Divine Beast/Creator God or whose original name is "L.S. Jalbaelom".) When Special Summoned, cards/effects cannot be activated, nor in response to this effect's activation.
author: Mardras
